title: How The PepsiCo (PEP) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Targets And Assumptions
description: PepsiCo’s fair value estimate has been nudged from US$172.00 to about US$171.05, a subtle shift that still matters if you are tracking where analysts think the stock should trade. Behind that move is a split set of price target updates, with some researchers lifting targets toward about US$181 on confidence in pricing and the product slate, while others trim targets by US$2 to US$7 as they rework growth and risk assumptions. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these moves and keep...
